data.name: Arcana: Heat and Cold. Stories
data.detailed_description:
Arcana Heat & Cold is a mix of hentai game, kinetic novel, rpg-maker-like adventure (the game is not made in rpg-maker), and occasional turn-based battles.

Hello, friends!
The new season is a proven formula: comedy, adventures, and hentai.
But it will especially appeal to those who really wanted to know more about the world in which the events of the game take place.

In this installment we:
- Dive into the history of the world of Arcana: Heat and Cold with Miley.
- Maybe meet Orange.
- Get to know more about the characters Spellbreaker has already met or will meet along the way, if he stays alive of course!

There are 5 chapters in this season, as they came out very intense. For example, one chapter has 3 different girls and 2 h-scenes!
And although the total length of the game, the amount of text and pictures is somewhere between Season 1 and Season 2, I decided to make this season the cheapest.

And as always:
- No grind.
- No penalties for the sake of artificially stretching out the game.
- No pixel hunting.

data.short_description: The events surrounding the unskilled magician are heating up! Could an unusual way of curing the Arcane Fever have caused such a stir?! Or have we accidentally become involved in a story whose scale we cannot yet comprehend!? Comedy, hentai scenes, and new hilarious adventures await you.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo 2.1 ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 550 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo 2.1 ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 550 MB 可用空間
